name: Supademo
description: MCP server for Supademo interactive demos — workspace verification and demo analytics webhooks

tools.name: verify_workspace
tools.description: Verify your API key and get workspace information (name, subscription plan)

tools.name: subscribe_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook to receive events when a new lead is captured or a demo is viewed

trigger.description: Event type to subscribe to. new-lead: fires when a lead is captured via demo form. demo-view: fires when someone views a demo.

url.description: Webhook endpoint URL to receive event payloads

tools.name: unsubscribe_webhook
tools.description: Remove a webhook subscription by its integration ID

integrationId.description: Integration ID returned from the subscribe call

tools.name: get_sample_data
tools.description: Get sample event data for a trigger type to understand the webhook payload format. For new-lead: returns email objects. For demo-view: returns name, email, company, demoTitle, demoLink, demoViewedAt.

trigger.description: Event type to get sample data for
